name: Block Drift-Style: Durable Nonce + Custom Program + Outflow
description: Blocks durable nonce transactions targeting a non-core custom program that also contain fund outflows in the same transaction. Low false positive rate - this combination is rare in legitimate use.

rule.message: BLOCKED: Durable nonce + custom program + fund outflow - Drift-style combined exploit pattern detected

name: Alert: Durable Nonce Targeting Custom Program
description: Alerts on any durable nonce transaction targeting a non-core custom program. Catches the Drift attack pre-signing step (admin takeover tx had no outflow). Will fire on legitimate multisig/governance workflows - operators should review and allowlist known-safe programs. Weight 60 contributes toward the blocking threshold.

rule.message: ALERT: Durable nonce transaction targeting non-core custom program - review for Drift-style pre-signed exploit (allowlist known-safe programs to suppress)

name: Block: Pre-signed Authority Change
description: Blocks any durable nonce transaction that contains an instruction whose first 8 bytes match a known authority/admin-transfer fingerprint. Fingerprints are computed from instruction names using the Anchor discriminator formula (SHA256('global:<name>')[0..8]) — no hardcoded byte values. The fingerprint list lives in rules/fingerprints/authority-change.json and can be extended without code changes. Covers any Anchor-based protocol. A pre-signed authority change has no legitimate operational justification — it is either an attack or a severe security failure requiring immediate review.

rule.message: BLOCKED: Pre-signed authority/admin change detected — durable nonce + known authority-transfer instruction fingerprint

metadata.trust: top-level instruction bytes are from the signed transaction (zero RPC trust). CPI inner instruction bytes come from meta.innerInstructions (RPC-supplied). Use your own RPC node to eliminate this trust dependency.
metadata.note: Fingerprints derived at runtime from instruction names in rules/fingerprints/authority-change.json — no hardcoded bytes

name: Block: Admin Change Instruction in Logs + Durable Nonce
description: Blocks when confirmed transaction logs contain an admin/authority-change instruction name AND a durable nonce was used. Requires logs to be available (confirmed tx analysis or simulation). Rule is fully data-driven - add more instruction names to the value list as new attack patterns emerge.

rule.message: BLOCKED: Durable nonce transaction contains admin/authority-change instruction in logs - Drift-style exploit pattern

metadata.note: Only fires when logs are available (confirmed tx or simulation). On sendTransaction without logs, falls back to structural rules.

name: Pass Revoke Operations
description: Explicitly allows revoke-only transactions (security improvement)

rule.message: ✅ SAFE: Revoking token delegation (security improvement)

name: Block Dangerous Operation Combinations
description: Blocks suspicious instruction combinations

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Dangerous instruction combination detected
Transaction blocked: Instruction contains excessive padding ({{padding:max_padding_bytes}} bytes). This pattern is commonly used in padding attacks to bypass security checks.
Transaction blocked: Instruction contains repeated padding pattern (e.g., 0x00 or 0xFF bytes). This suggests a malicious attempt to hide or obfuscate instruction data.
Transaction blocked: Instruction padding ratio ({{padding:max_padding_ratio}}x) exceeds safe threshold. The instruction data is significantly larger than expected for its type.

name: Medium: Multiple Instructions with Suspicious Padding

rule.message: Warning: Transaction contains {{padding:suspicious_instruction_count}} instructions with suspicious padding. Review the transaction details carefully before proceeding.

name: Low: Single Instruction with Moderate Padding

rule.message: Advisory: Instruction contains moderate padding ({{padding:max_padding_bytes}} bytes). This may be legitimate (e.g., Token-2022 extensions) but warrants review.

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Liquidity drained (-80%+ in 24h) - rug pull in progress

name: Block Tokens with Freeze Authority
description: Blocks tokens that retain freeze authority (Type 1 rug pull)
author: securecheck

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Token has freeze authority - can freeze your account at any time

name: Block Extreme Token Concentration
description: Blocks tokens where top holders own >70% (centralized control)
author: securecheck

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Extreme token concentration - top holders own >70% of supply

metadata.paper_finding: Rug pulls show 34.8% top-10 concentration vs 30.4% legitimate

name: Block Multiple Rug Pull Indicators
description: Blocks tokens with 3+ rug pull risk indicators
author: securecheck

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Multiple rug pull indicators detected (3+ red flags)

name: Warn on High Concentration
description: Alerts when top holders own >50% of supply
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: High token concentration - top holders own >50% of supply

name: Warn on High Dev Holdings
description: Alerts when developer holds >30% of supply
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Developer holds >30% of token supply

name: Warn on Low Organic Trading
description: Alerts when token shows low organic trading activity (possible wash trading)
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Low organic trading score - possible wash trading detected

metadata.note: Wash trading is common in pump-and-dump schemes

name: Caution on Very New Tokens
description: Alerts on tokens less than 24 hours old (highest risk period)
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️ CAUTION: Token less than 24 hours old - highest risk period for rug pulls

metadata.paper_finding: Median rug pull lifecycle = 0.0116 days (17 minutes)
metadata.note: 95.69% of rug pull activity occurs on day 1

name: Warn on Low Organic Buyer Count
description: Alerts when token has very few organic buyers despite activity
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Very few organic buyers despite activity - possible coordinated manipulation

metadata.note: Research shows organized syndicates create fake holder activity

name: Warn on Very Low Holder Count
description: Alerts when token has suspiciously few holders
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Token has very few holders (median rug pull = 9 holders)

metadata.paper_finding: Rug pulls have median 9 holders vs 41,026 for legitimate tokens

name: Allow Verified High-Quality Tokens
description: Bypasses warnings for Jupiter-verified tokens with high organic score
author: securecheck

rule.message: ✅ Verified token with good organic trading

metadata.note: This rule allows transactions to bypass other checks for trusted tokens

name: Block Confirmed Rugpulls
description: Block transactions with tokens that are confirmed rugpulls by Rugcheck

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Token confirmed as rug pull by Rugcheck

name: Alert on Freeze Authority Enabled
description: Warn when token has freeze authority enabled with low safety score

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Token has freeze authority - verify project trustworthiness

name: Block Danger-Level Tokens
description: Block tokens with danger-level risk indicators from Rugcheck

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Token has danger-level risks (Rugcheck)

name: Alert on Active Mint Authority
description: Warn when token has active mint authority (infinite supply risk)

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Token has active mint authority - supply can be inflated

name: Unexpected Balance Loss
description: Detects transactions that would drain significant SOL without receiving tokens
author: securecheck

rule.message: Transaction would drain >1 SOL with no tokens received in return

name: Delegation with Balance Loss
description: Detects dangerous combination of token delegation and SOL loss
author: securecheck

rule.message: Token delegation combined with significant SOL loss (>0.5 SOL)

name: Suspicious Program Logs
description: Detects suspicious keywords in program execution logs
author: securecheck

rule.message: Program logs contain suspicious keywords (drain, exploit, steal, etc.)

name: Simulation Failure with Balance Loss
description: Detects simulations that fail but would still result in balance loss
author: securecheck

rule.message: Transaction simulation failed but would still result in balance loss

name: NFT Transfer Alert
description: Alerts when NFTs would be transferred
author: securecheck

rule.message: Transaction would transfer NFT(s)

name: Complete Token Drain
description: Detects when tokens would be fully drained to zero
author: securecheck

rule.message: Transaction would completely drain token account(s) to zero

name: Excessive Compute Usage
description: Detects unusually high compute unit consumption
author: securecheck

rule.message: Transaction uses excessive compute units (possible inefficiency or obfuscation)

name: Large Percentage Balance Loss
description: Alerts when transaction would drain >50% of SOL balance
author: securecheck

rule.message: Transaction would drain more than 50% of your SOL balance

name: Multiple Account Drains
description: Detects when multiple accounts would lose balance
author: securecheck

rule.message: Transaction would drain balances from 3+ accounts

name: CPI Calls with Error Logs
description: Detects CPI calls combined with error messages in logs
author: securecheck

rule.message: CPI calls detected with error messages in logs (possible failed exploit attempt)

name: Alert on Suspicious Program Behavior
description: Warn when simulation logs show suspicious program behavior patterns
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Suspicious program behavior detected in simulation logs

name: Block Suspicious Logs with Balance Changes
description: Block when suspicious log patterns coincide with balance decreases
author: securecheck

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Suspicious program behavior with SOL drain detected

name: Suspicious Squads Threshold Change
description: Detects threshold changes combined with other governance operations in a single transaction

name: Squads Member Removal Detected
description: Alerts when a member is removed from a Squads multisig

name: Rapid Squads Governance Changes
description: Detects multiple governance changes in a single transaction (possible takeover attempt)

name: Squads Execution Without Proposal
description: Detects transaction execution without a visible proposal creation (possible bypass)

name: Squads Spending Limit Removal
description: Alerts when spending limits are removed from a Squads multisig

name: Squads Threshold Lowering
description: Detects when approval threshold is being changed (could be lowered to reduce security)

name: Multiple Squads Security Concerns
description: Detects transactions with multiple security concerns flagged

name: Squads Governance Change with Immediate Execution
description: Detects governance changes combined with transaction execution in same transaction

name: Test: Auto Behavior (Smart Default)
description: Without Helius: should alert on programs with authority changes
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️  Authority change by program (auto behavior)

metadata.comment: Smart default: missing helius_identity treated as empty array

name: Test: Fail Behavior (Conservative)
description: Without Helius: should NEVER alert (always fails)
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️  Authority change by program (fail behavior - should not see this without Helius)

metadata.comment: Fail mode: missing helius_identity = condition fails = no alert

name: Test: Pass Behavior (Permissive)
description: Without Helius: should ALWAYS alert (always passes)
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️  Scammer check (pass behavior - should see this even without Helius)

metadata.comment: Pass mode: missing helius_identity = condition passes = alert

name: Block Non-Core Programs
description: For trading bots - only allow core Solana programs by default

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Transaction uses non-core programs (configure allowlist in separate rules)

metadata.note: Combine with program-allowlist.json to allow specific DEXes/protocols

name: Block All Token Delegations
description: Bots should never delegate tokens

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Token delegation detected (bots should never approve)

name: Block Authority Changes
description: Bots should never change account authority

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Authority change detected (not allowed for bots)

name: Block Account Creation
description: Bots should not create accounts

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Account creation detected (not allowed for bots)

name: Limit SOL Transfers
description: Bots should only transfer small amounts for fees

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: SOL transfer exceeds bot limit (0.1 SOL)

name: Block Freeze/Thaw Operations
description: Bots should never interact with freeze authority

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Freeze/thaw operation detected (not allowed for bots)

name: Block Mint/Burn Operations
description: Bots should only trade, not create/destroy tokens

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Token supply modification detected (not allowed for bots)

name: Block High Complexity Transactions
description: Bots should only execute simple swap transactions

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Transaction too complex for bot safety threshold

name: Authority Changes - Suspicious Program
description: Alerts only when truly unknown/suspicious programs (no OtterSec verification AND no Helius identity) attempt authority changes
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️  Authority change by program with NO verification or identity

metadata.comment: Only alerts when program has neither OtterSec verification NOR Helius identity - truly unknown programs

name: Known Scammer Interaction
description: Alerts when transaction involves addresses tagged as scammers
author: securecheck

rule.message: 🚨 Transaction involves known scammer address

name: Suspicious Address Interaction
description: Warns about interactions with suspicious addresses
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️  Transaction involves suspicious address
